alert.title: Formula Pending Verification
alert.desc: Current calculation is an estimate. Drag chain length and model selection should be confirmed with an engineer. Factors: turntable radius, rotation angle, cable bend radius.

formula.title: Formula:
formula.chainLength: Chain length ≈ π × R × θ/180 + straight margin (1.5m)
formula.bendRadius: Bend radius ≥ cable min bend radius × 1.5
formula.warning: ⚠ Above formulas are estimates, engineer confirmation required
